name: A Mortal Harvest: The Harvest Festival Ring of Maranwe

pages.name: The Harvest Festival Ring of Maranwe

text.content:
A magical ring that grants the ability to speak and understand any human language. Also allows the carrier to speak and understand verbal Myths languages with a still hard (1D8). Sl does not convey any knowledge of reading, only the spoken word. The ring does not create a two-penalty dice roll for reading unless learned through magical means. Forces the carrier to speak and understand the Cthulhu Myths languages.

Refer to the Britannia & Beyond rulebook for full handout text.
